# Phase 1 — Project scaffold agent

## Status
Archival prompt only. The current repository already contains the scaffold plus the full implementation, so this prompt should not be used to regenerate the project from scratch.

## Original intent
This prompt was used to generate the initial boilerplate files for the project.

## Current note
If you need to regenerate or compare the baseline, use the live repository files as the source of truth instead of this prompt.
